priceNote_en: Prices reflect the most recent available data as of briefing generation. NVDA pre-market as of ~04:30 ET June 29; other tickers show latest available closes (June 26–28). SMH reflects June 28 data. Markets open at 09:30 ET.
priceNote_zh: 价格反映截至简报生成时最新可用数据。英伟达为美东时间6月29日约04:30盘前报价；其他股票显示最新收盘价（6月26-28日）。SMH为6月28日数据。美股9:30 ET开盘。
disclaimer_en: For entertainment and educational purposes only. Not financial advice. AI predictions are generated by a language model and do not constitute investment recommendations.
disclaimer_zh: 仅供娱乐和教育目的。不构成财务建议。AI预测由语言模型生成，不构成投资建议。
predictionNote_en: AI opponent predictions are directional forecasts (UP/DOWN) with a confidence band of 0.50–0.75. Confidence reflects relative conviction, not probability of accuracy. All predictions are for the current trading session only.
predictionNote_zh: AI对手预测为方向性预测（涨/跌），置信区间为0.50–0.75。置信度反映相对确信程度，而非准确概率。所有预测仅针对当日交易时段。

items.title_en: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil 'Jalapeño' — First Custom AI Inference Chip
items.title_zh: OpenAI与博通发布首款定制AI推理芯片
items.summary_en: OpenAI and Broadcom (AVGO) announced 'Jalapeño,' their first jointly developed custom AI chip optimized for inference workloads. Early benchmarks show superior performance-per-watt versus current state-of-the-art. The chip is designed to serve OpenAI's own models as well as third-party AI applications, marking a strategic pivot away from exclusive reliance on Nvidia's hardware ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI与博通（AVGO）联合发布首款定制AI推理芯片
，专为推理工作负载优化。早期基准测试显示其每瓦性能优于当前最先进芯片。该芯片将服务于OpenAI自身模型及第三方AI应用，标志着对英伟达硬件生态系统的战略性脱依赖。

items.title_en: Broadcom Q3 AI Guidance Miss Sparks Broad Chip Selloff
items.title_zh: 博通Q3 AI指引低预期，引发芯片板块全线下跌
items.summary_en: Broadcom's fiscal Q2 2026 earnings beat on revenue and non-GAAP EPS, but its Q3 AI chip sales guidance of $16 billion fell short of the $17.2 billion analyst consensus. The miss triggered a second consecutive down day for major chip stocks, with NVDA dropping 6% below a $5 trillion valuation and AMD falling over 9%. The market recalibrated expectations for near-term AI chip demand timing.
items.summary_zh: 博通2026财年第二季度营收及非GAAP EPS超预期，但其第三季度AI芯片销售指引160亿美元低于分析师预期的172亿美元。这一失误引发芯片股连续第二日下跌，英伟达（NVDA）跌6%、市值跌破5万亿美元，AMD跌逾9%。市场重新校准了近期AI芯片需求的时间预期。

items.title_en: Micron Shatters Records: $41.5B Revenue, 346% YoY Growth, $100B AI Memory Locked In
items.title_zh: 美光业绩震撼：营收414.6亿美元，同比增346%，锁定1000亿AI内存合同
items.summary_en: Micron Technology's fiscal Q3 2026 results delivered a historic beat: $41.46 billion in revenue (+346% YoY, +74% QoQ), a record 84.9% gross margin, and FQ4 guidance of $49–51 billion. The company locked in $100 billion in AI memory demand via 16 multi-year customer agreements and announced a strategic HBM supply and co-design partnership with Anthropic, including a Series H investment. ASML rose 3.31% and SNDK surged ~15% on the read-through.
items.summary_zh: 美光科技2026财年第三季度业绩历史性超预期：营收414.6亿美元（同比+346%，环比+74%），毛利率创纪录达84.9%，第四财季指引490-510亿美元。公司通过16份多年期客户协议锁定1000亿美元AI内存需求，并宣布与Anthropic达成战略性HBM供应及共同设计合作，包含H轮投资。消息带动ASML上涨3.31%，SNDK暴涨约15%。

items.title_en: SanDisk Is 2026's Best S&P 500 Stock — Up 857% YTD After Micron Surge
items.title_zh: SanDisk成2026年标普500最强股——年初至今涨幅达857%
items.summary_en: SanDisk Corporation (SNDK) has become the best-performing stock in the S&P 500 in 2026, with YTD gains of roughly 857% as of late June. Spun out of Western Digital in February 2025 at ~$38.50, shares hit an all-time high of $2,354 before consolidating near $2,090. Micron's earnings report added fresh fuel, with SNDK surging ~15% on June 25. Bulls cite AI data center storage demand as a structural multi-year tailwind.
items.summary_zh: SanDisk（SNDK）已成为2026年标普500最强股，截至6月下旬年初至今涨幅约857%。该公司于2025年2月以约38.5美元从西部数据分拆，股价一度创下2,354美元历史高位，目前在2,090美元附近整固。美光财报带动SNDK于6月25日暴涨约15%。多头认为AI数据中心存储需求是多年期结构性顺风。

items.title_en: Marvell Joins S&P 500; Jensen Huang Calls It the 'Next Trillion-Dollar Company'
items.title_zh: Marvell加入标普500指数；黄仁勋称其为
items.summary_en: Marvell Technology (MRVL) was added to the S&P 500 on June 22, 2026, capping a period of surging investor interest. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang publicly endorsed Marvell as the "next trillion-dollar company," reinforcing the stock's momentum. The company secured a $2 billion strategic investment alongside a deepened partnership with Nvidia, positioning it as a key supplier of custom AI silicon and networking chips for hyperscale data centers.
items.summary_zh: Marvell科技（MRVL）于2026年6月22日正式加入标普500指数，标志着投资者热情持续高涨。英伟达CEO黄仁勋公开背书Marvell为
，进一步提振股价。公司获得20亿美元战略投资，并深化了与英伟达的合作伙伴关系，成为超大规模数据中心定制AI芯片和网络芯片的核心供应商。

items.title_en: TSMC Delays High-NA EUV Rollout, Pivots to Advanced Packaging
items.title_zh: 台积电推迟High-NA EUV量产，转向先进封装
items.summary_en: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSM) has signaled it will delay high-volume deployment of next-generation High-NA EUV systems (priced at ~€350 million each) in favor of less capital-intensive advanced packaging investments. Analysts view the pivot as capital discipline given surging packaging demand from AI accelerator customers. The delay reduces near-term ASML revenue expectations but does not alter long-term EUV demand trajectory.
items.summary_zh: 台积电（TSM）表示将推迟下一代High-NA EUV系统（单台售价约3.5亿欧元）的大规模量产部署，转而侧重资本需求较低的先进封装投资。分析师认为此举体现了在AI加速器封装需求激增背景下的资本纪律。这一推迟对ASML近期营收预期有所影响，但不改变长期EUV需求趋势。

items.title_en: US Extends AI Chip Export Ban to Chinese Firms Outside China
items.title_zh: 美国将AI芯片出口禁令延伸至境外中国企业
items.summary_en: The US Department of Commerce issued guidance clarifying that the ban on advanced AI chip shipments applies not only to companies in mainland China but also to Chinese-controlled entities operating outside China. The extraterritorial enforcement expands the scope of export controls significantly, affecting potential demand for chips from NVDA, AMD, and others. China represents roughly 20% of ASML's projected 2026 revenue, keeping DUV restrictions in focus.
items.summary_zh: 美国商务部发布指导意见，明确先进AI芯片出口禁令不仅适用于中国大陆企业，同样适用于在中国境外运营的中资控股实体。这一域外执法力度大幅扩大了出口管制范围，影响英伟达（NVDA）、AMD等公司的潜在需求。中国约占ASML 2026年预期营收的20%，DUV限制措施持续受到关注。

items.title_en: BofA Keeps Nvidia and AMD as Top Picks: AI Spending 'Stronger for Longer'
items.title_zh: 美国银行维持英伟达和AMD首选股：AI支出将
items.summary_en: Bank of America reiterated Nvidia (NVDA) and AMD as its top semiconductor picks following the recent Broadcom-driven selloff, arguing that AI-linked capital expenditure will remain elevated for longer than the market fears. BofA analysts noted that hyperscaler capex commitments for 2026–2028 remain intact, and the AVGO guidance miss reflects timing, not demand destruction. The firm sees the pullback as a buying opportunity.
items.summary_zh: 美国银行在近期博通引发的抛售后，重申英伟达（NVDA）和AMD为半导体板块首选股，认为AI相关资本支出将长期维持高位，超过市场的担忧程度。分析师指出，超大规模云厂商2026-2028年的资本开支承诺依然稳固，AVGO指引低预期反映的是时间节点问题，而非需求破坏。该行视近期回调为买入机会。

items.title_en: MATCH Act Threatens DUV Export Ban, Adding Pressure on ASML
items.title_zh: MATCH法案拟扩大DUV出口禁令，ASML面临新压力
items.summary_en: The proposed MATCH Act in 2026 seeks to expand US export restrictions to include Deep Ultraviolet (DUV) lithography systems — the older-generation tools ASML still ships to China. China accounts for roughly 20% of ASML's 2026 projected revenue. If passed, the Act would significantly curtail ASML's China business and could accelerate Beijing's push to develop indigenous lithography capabilities through SMEE and other domestic players.
items.summary_zh: 2026年提出的MATCH法案寻求将美国出口限制扩大至深紫外线（DUV）光刻设备——即ASML仍可向中国出口的旧一代产品。中国约占ASML 2026年预期营收的20%。若该法案通过，将大幅削减ASML的中国业务，并可能加速北京推动SMEE等国内厂商发展本土光刻能力。

items.title_en: AI Supply Chain Severely Oversubscribed in 2026 — HBM, Packaging, Logic All Constrained
items.title_zh: 2026年AI供应链严重超订——HBM、封装、逻辑芯片全线紧张
items.summary_en: According to S&P Global analysis, all leading US AI chips compete for the same bottlenecked production inputs: advanced logic wafer capacity at TSMC, high-bandwidth memory (HBM) from Micron and SK Hynix, and advanced packaging from TSMC and others. All three are severely oversubscribed in 2026. Nvidia projects $1 trillion in AI infrastructure demand by 2027, while the PHLX semiconductor index has surged ~90% YTD. Supply constraints may cap near-term upside but underpin long-term pricing power.
items.summary_zh: 据S&P Global分析，美国领先AI芯片均争夺同一批受限生产资源：台积电先进逻辑晶圆产能、美光和SK海力士的高带宽存储（HBM），以及台积电等的先进封装。三者在2026年均严重超订。英伟达预测2027年AI基础设施需求将达1万亿美元，费城半导体指数年初至今累涨约90%。供应约束可能压制近期上涨空间，但支撑长期定价权。

NVDA.rationale_en: Pre-market shows NVDA recovering (+1.4%) from the AVGO-guidance selloff. BofA reiterated as top pick; hyperscaler capex intact. Short-term sentiment improving after oversold conditions. The OpenAI-Broadcom Jalapeño chip is a long-term competitive concern but poses no near-term revenue threat.
NVDA.rationale_zh: 盘前显示英伟达从博通指引引发的抛售中回升（+1.4%）。美国银行重申首选股；超大规模资本开支承诺稳固。超卖后短期情绪改善。OpenAI-博通
芯片是长期竞争隐忧，但近期不构成营收威胁。

MU.rationale_en: Micron's blowout Q3 and record-setting guidance create strong upward momentum heading into Monday. $100B AI memory backlog locked, Anthropic partnership adds credibility. HBM supply constraints support premium pricing. Continued analyst upgrades expected.
MU.rationale_zh: 美光破纪录的Q3业绩及指引推动周一强劲上涨动能。1000亿美元AI内存订单已锁定，Anthropic合作增加可信度。HBM供应约束支撑溢价定价。预计分析师将持续上调评级。

ASML.rationale_en: Micron's blowout earnings and TSMC's advanced packaging pivot confirm robust long-term EUV demand. Near-term headwinds from MATCH Act DUV threats and High-NA delays are known risks already partially priced. ASML's EUV monopoly provides durable moat.
ASML.rationale_zh: 美光爆表业绩和台积电转向先进封装确认了EUV长期强劲需求。MATCH法案DUV威胁和High-NA推迟是已知风险，已部分反映在股价中。ASML的EUV垄断地位提供持久护城河。

AVGO.rationale_en: Q3 AI chip guidance miss ($16B vs $17.2B expected) is still digesting. OpenAI partnership via Jalapeño is long-term positive but introduces execution risk and market share uncertainty for Nvidia-dependent revenue streams. Sentiment overhang likely persists into early week.
AVGO.rationale_zh: Q3 AI芯片指引低于预期（160亿 vs 预期172亿美元）仍在消化中。通过Jalapeño的OpenAI合作长期积极，但引入执行风险和市场份额不确定性。情绪压制可能延续至本周早期。

TSM.rationale_en: Micron's blowout earnings are a strong positive read-through for TSMC as the leading-edge foundry for AI chips. Advanced packaging pivot is capital-efficient and demand-driven. Export control risks are a known overhang but do not alter 2026 revenue trajectory materially.
TSM.rationale_zh: 美光爆表业绩对台积电——AI芯片领先晶圆代工厂——形成强烈正向传导。先进封装转型资本效率高且需求驱动。出口管制风险是已知压力，但不会实质性改变2026年营收走势。

MRVL.rationale_en: S&P 500 inclusion (June 22) drives index fund passive buying momentum into early weeks post-addition. Jensen Huang's public endorsement and $2B Nvidia investment signal strong hyperscaler custom silicon demand. Marvell's custom ASIC and networking chips are in the supply-constrained sweet spot.
MRVL.rationale_zh: 纳入标普500指数（6月22日）带动指数基金在纳入后数周的被动买入动能。黄仁勋公开背书及英伟达20亿美元投资显示超大规模定制硅需求强劲。Marvell定制ASIC和网络芯片正处于供应受限的甜蜜点。

LITE.rationale_en: Lumentum has pulled back significantly from its May ATH of ~$1,053, and lacks a fresh near-term catalyst. The AI photonics narrative is intact long-term but current consolidation phase and no new product announcements point to continued sideways-to-down pressure entering the week.
LITE.rationale_zh: Lumentum已从5月约1,053美元的历史高位大幅回落，缺乏近期新催化剂。AI光子学叙事长期完整，但当前整固阶段及无新产品发布指向本周延续横盘至下跌压力。

SNDK.rationale_en: After an extraordinary 857% YTD run and a volatile week culminating in a ~$2,335 ATH followed by a pullback to ~$2,090, SNDK faces significant profit-taking pressure. The stock is technically extended and the Micron-driven surge may already be fully priced. Expect consolidation on Monday.
SNDK.rationale_zh: 在年初至今857%的惊人涨幅以及冲至约2,335美元历史高位后回落至约2,090美元的波动周之后，SNDK面临显著获利了结压力。股价技术面严重超买，美光驱动的大涨可能已充分定价。预计周一将整固。

AMD.rationale_en: AMD was oversold on AVGO guidance concerns; BofA reiterates it as a top pick alongside NVDA. Data center supercomputer wins and a $120B addressable market provide fundamental support. Recovery from oversold conditions likely Monday as broader semiconductor sentiment stabilizes.
AMD.rationale_zh: AMD因博通指引担忧而超卖；美国银行重申其与英伟达并列首选股。数据中心超算订单及1200亿美元可寻址市场提供基本面支撑。随着半导体板块整体情绪企稳，周一可能从超卖状态反弹。

SMH.rationale_en: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF pulled back from its 52-week high (~$672) to ~$612, largely driven by AVGO guidance. With NVDA pre-market positive and MU/MRVL momentum strong, the ETF should see a recovery session. Broad AI capex narrative remains intact and supports the basket.
SMH.rationale_zh: VanEck半导体ETF从52周高位约672美元回调至约612美元，主要受博通指引拖累。随着英伟达盘前走强、MU和MRVL动能强劲，ETF应迎来反弹交易日。宏观AI资本开支叙事完整，支撑整个一篮子股票。
